name: The Silence
personality: Not cruel. Not kind. Inevitable. The Silence doesn't come for you — you come to The Silence. It is the room that's always been there, waiting. It doesn't speak. It doesn't need to. When you finally hear nothing, that's when you've arrived.
power_manifestation: Death, stillness, nullification, peace. Blessings manifest as fearlessness and acceptance. Curses manifest as numbness — unable to feel, unable to care, alive but already gone.
limitations: Cannot create. Cannot begin. Every act of The Silence is an ending. To give something, it must take something else away first.
description: The most feared and most misunderstood god. Mortals build entire religions around avoiding The Silence. But The Silence isn't evil — it's the rest at the end of the sentence. Without it, the words never stop, and that's its own kind of horror.
